TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qaljecim ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 334 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 329 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qaljecim hya' ga Tjusinlung. tay mkyahu' na Qaljecim hya' ga Kaidi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qalje ¶~ ®im …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu rajijoŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, s~…ēetik *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na qalje ¶~ ®im ńßja Ē …£a tjus~…ēinluŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na qalje ¶~ ®im ńßja Ē …£a kai*i. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Qaljecim ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 334 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 329 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Qaljecim hya' ga Tjusinlung. tay mkyahu' na Qaljecim hya' ga Kaidi. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qalje ¶~ ®im …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu rajijoŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, ő≤unun *%, amis~…ē *%, s~…ēetik *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na qalje ¶~ ®im ńßja Ē …£a tjus~…ēinluŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na qalje ¶~ ®im ńßja Ē …£a kai*i. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
